testcase.name: testRegisterUser
testcase.system-out: ==================================================================================== 🟢 [BASE TEST] Browser started: CHROME | Headless Mode: true | Maximize Mode: true ==================================================================================== [SETUP] User1: existing1@me.com ============================== Registered: existing1@me.com ============================== [SETUP] User2: existing2@me.com ============================== Registered: existing2@me.com ============================== [SETUP] Both users registered. Ready for tests. ============================== ========== TC1: Register User ========== STEP 1: Browser launched. STEP 2: Opening home page... STEP 3: Verifying home page is visible... STEP 4: Clicking 'Signup / Login' button... STEP 5: Verifying 'New User Signup!' is visible... STEP 6: Entering name and email address... STEP 7: Clicking Signup button... STEP 8: Verifying 'ENTER ACCOUNT INFORMATION' is visible... STEP 9: Filling account details... STEP 10: Selecting 'Sign up for our newsletter!'... STEP 11: Selecting 'Receive special offers from our partners!'... STEP 12: Filling address details... STEP 13: Clicking Create Account... STEP 14: Verifying 'Account Created!' is visible... STEP 15: Clicking Continue... STEP 16: Verifying 'Logged in as username' is visible... STEP 17: Clicking 'Delete Account'... STEP 18: Verifying 'ACCOUNT DELETED!' and clicking Continue... ✅ TC1 PASSED: User Registered Successfully. ============================================
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.

testcase.name: testLoginWithCorrectCredentials
testcase.system-out: ========== TC2: Login with correct credentials ========== STEP 1: Browser launched. STEP 2: Opening home page... STEP 3: Verifying home page is visible... STEP 4: Clicking 'Signup / Login' button... STEP 5: Verifying 'Login to your account' is visible... STEP 6: Entering correct email and password... STEP 7: Clicking Login button... STEP 8: Verifying 'Logged in as username' is visible... STEP 9: Clicking 'Delete Account'... STEP 10: Verifying 'ACCOUNT DELETED!' and clicking Continue... ✅ TC2 PASSED: Login User with correct email and password Successfully. =======================================================================

testcase.name: testLoginWithIncorrectCredentials
testcase.system-out: ========== TC3: Login with incorrect credentials ========== STEP 1: Browser launched. STEP 2: Opening home page... STEP 3: Verifying home page is visible... STEP 4: Clicking 'Signup / Login' button... STEP 5: Verifying 'Login to your account' is visible... STEP 6: Entering incorrect email and password... STEP 7: Clicking Login button... STEP 8: Verifying error message is visible... ✅ TC3 PASSED: Login with incorrect credentials shows error. ============================================================

testcase.name: testLogout
testcase.system-out: ========== TC4: Logout User ========== STEP 1: Browser launched. STEP 2: Opening home page... STEP 3: Verifying home page is visible... STEP 4: Clicking 'Signup / Login' button... STEP 5: Verifying 'Login to your account' is visible... STEP 6: Entering correct email and password... STEP 7: Clicking Login button... STEP 8: Verifying 'Logged in as username' is visible... STEP 9: Clicking Logout button... STEP 10: Verifying user is navigated to home page... ✅ TC4 PASSED: Logout successful. ==================================

testcase.name: testRegisterUserWithExistingEmail
testcase.system-out: ========== TC5: Register with existing email ========== STEP 1: Browser launched. STEP 2: Opening home page... STEP 3: Verifying home page is visible... STEP 4: Clicking 'Signup / Login' button... STEP 5: Verifying 'New User Signup!' is visible... STEP 6: Entering name and already registered email... STEP 7: Clicking Signup button... STEP 8: Verifying error message is visible... ✅ TC5 PASSED: Register User with existing email shows error. =============================================================

testcase.name: testContactUs
testcase.system-out:
Account already deleted: existing1@me.com — skipping. ==============================
Could not delete existing2@me.com: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element found by By.cssSelector: li > a[href="/login"] (tried for 10 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '25.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.160, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\MOSTAF~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:62237}, goog:processID: 6088, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:62237/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.160, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: fafd8372516015bed82f2065f55f2e2c ==============================
[CLEANUP] Both existing accounts deleted. ============================== 🔴 [BASE TEST] Browser closed. ================================ ==================================================================================== 🟢 [BASE TEST] Browser started: CHROME | Headless Mode: true | Maximize Mode: true ==================================================================================== ========== TC6: Contact Us Form ========== STEP 1: Browser launched. STEP 2: Opening home page... STEP 3: Verifying home page is visible... STEP 4: Clicking 'Contact us' button... STEP 5: Verifying 'GET IN TOUCH' is visible... STEP 6: Filling contact form details... STEP 7: Uploading attachment... STEP 8: Clicking Submit button... STEP 9: Accepting confirmation alert... STEP 10: Verifying success message is visible... STEP 11: Clicking Home button and verifying home page... ✅ TC6 PASSED: Contact Us Form submitted successfully. ========================================================

testcase.name: testTestCasesPage
testcase.system-out: ========== TC7: Verify Test Cases Page ========== STEP 1: Browser launched. STEP 2: Opening home page... STEP 3: Verifying home page is visible... STEP 4: Clicking 'Test Cases' button... STEP 5: Verifying Test Cases page is displayed... ✅ TC7 PASSED: Test Cases Page open successfully. ========================================================

testcase.name: testVerifyAllProductsAndProductDetailPage
testcase.system-out: 🔴 [BASE TEST] Browser closed. ================================ ==================================================================================== 🟢 [BASE TEST] Browser started: CHROME | Headless Mode: true | Maximize Mode: true ==================================================================================== ========== TC8: Verify All Products and product detail page ========== STEP 1: Browser launched. STEP 2: Opening home page... STEP 3: Verifying home page is visible... STEP 4: Clicking 'Products' button... STEP 5: Verifying ALL PRODUCTS page is displayed... STEP 6: Verifying products list is available... STEP 7: Scrolling to product and clicking 'View Product'... STEP 8: Verifying product detail page is displayed... STEP 9: Verifying product details (name, category, price, availability, condition, brand)... ✅ TC8 PASSED: All Products and product detail verified. ======================================================

testcase.name: testSearchProduct
testcase.system-out: ========== TC9: Search Product ========== STEP 1: Browser launched. STEP 2: Opening home page... STEP 3: Verifying home page is visible... STEP 4: Clicking 'Products' button... STEP 5: Verifying ALL PRODUCTS page is displayed... STEP 6: Searching for 'T-Shirt'... STEP 7: Verifying 'SEARCHED PRODUCTS' is visible... STEP 8: Verifying all results are related to search... ✅ TC9 PASSED: All Products are related to the search text. ======================================================

testcase.name: testVerifySubscriptionInHomePage
testcase.system-out: ========== TC10: Verify Subscription in home page ========== STEP 1: Browser launched. STEP 2: Opening home page... STEP 3: Verifying home page is visible... STEP 4: Scrolling down to footer... STEP 5: Verifying 'SUBSCRIPTION' text is visible... STEP 6: Entering email and clicking subscribe... STEP 7: Verifying subscription success message... ✅ TC10 PASSED: Subscription in home page Verified Successfully. ======================================================

testcase.name: testVerifySubscriptionInCartPage
testcase.system-out: ========== TC11: Verify Subscription in Cart page ========== STEP 1: Browser launched. STEP 2: Opening home page... STEP 3: Verifying home page is visible... STEP 4: Clicking 'Cart' button... STEP 5: Scrolling down to footer... STEP 6: Verifying 'SUBSCRIPTION' text is visible... STEP 7: Entering email and clicking subscribe... STEP 8: Verifying subscription success message... ✅ TC11 PASSED: Subscription in Cart page Verified Successfully. ======================================================

testcase.name: testAddProductsInCart
testcase.system-out: ========== TC12: Add Products in Cart ========== STEP 1: Browser launched. STEP 2: Opening home page... STEP 3: Verifying home page is visible... STEP 4: Clicking 'Products' button... STEP 5: Adding first product to cart... STEP 6: Clicking 'Continue Shopping'... STEP 7: Adding second product to cart... STEP 8: Clicking 'View Cart'... STEP 9: Verifying both products are in cart... STEP 10: Verifying prices, quantities and total prices... ✅ TC12 PASSED: All products verified in cart. ==============================================

testcase.name: testVerifyProductQuantityInCart
testcase.system-out: ========== TC13: Verify Product quantity in Cart ========== STEP 1: Browser launched. STEP 2: Opening home page... STEP 3: Verifying home page is visible... STEP 4: Clicking 'View Product'... STEP 5: Verifying product detail page is displayed... STEP 6: Setting quantity to 4... STEP 7: Clicking 'Add to cart'... STEP 8: Clicking 'View Cart'... STEP 9: Verifying product quantity in cart... ✅ TC13 PASSED: Product quantity verified in cart. ==============================================

testcase.name: testRemoveProductsFromCart
testcase.system-out: ========== TC17: Remove Products From Cart ========== STEP 1: Browser launched. STEP 2: Opening home page... STEP 3: Verifying home page is visible... STEP 4: Adding products to cart... STEP 5: Clicking 'Cart' button... STEP 6: Verifying cart page is displayed... STEP 7: Removing first product from cart... STEP 8: Verifying product was removed... ✅ TC17 PASSED: Product removed successfully. =============================================

testcase.name: testAddToCartFromRecommendedItems
testcase.system-out: ========== TC22: Add to cart from Recommended items ========== STEP 1: Browser launched. STEP 2: Opening home page... STEP 3: Scrolling to Recommended Items... STEP 4: Verifying 'RECOMMENDED ITEMS' section... STEP 5: Adding recommended product to cart... STEP 6: Clicking 'View Cart'... STEP 7: Verifying product is in cart... ✅ TC22 PASSED: Recommended product added to cart. ===================================================

testcase.name: testPlaceOrderRegisterBeforeCheckout
testcase.system-out: 🔴 [BASE TEST] Browser closed. ================================ ==================================================================================== 🟢 [BASE TEST] Browser started: CHROME | Headless Mode: true | Maximize Mode: true ==================================================================================== ========== TC14: Place Order - Register while Checkout ========== STEP 1: Browser launched. STEP 2: Opening home page... STEP 3: Verifying home page is visible... STEP 4: Adding products to cart... STEP 5: Clicking 'Cart' button... STEP 6: Verifying cart page is displayed... STEP 7 & 8: Proceeding to checkout and clicking Register/Login... STEP 9: Filling signup details and creating account... STEP 10: Verifying 'ACCOUNT CREATED!' and clicking Continue... STEP 11: Verifying 'Logged in as username'... STEP 12: Clicking 'Cart' button... STEP 13: Clicking 'Proceed To Checkout'... STEP 14: Verifying Address Details and Review Your Order... STEP 15: Entering description and clicking Place Order... STEP 16: Entering payment details... STEP 17: Clicking 'Pay and Confirm Order'... STEP 18: Verifying order success messages... STEP 19: Clicking 'Delete Account'... STEP 20: Verifying 'ACCOUNT DELETED!' and clicking Continue... ✅ TC14 PASSED: Order placed while registering during checkout. ======================================================

testcase.name: testPlaceOrderRegisterWhileCheckout

failure.message:
element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (348, 161). Other element would receive the click:

...

(Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.160) Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '25.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [aaca3839202444643547357f5c74f6d6, clickElement {id=f.576E65CEAAB3A8CDE0D7E2D13E5ADC42.d.93AECD03C787B2BA3EBAFAB8425AD3D4.e.492}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.160, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\MOSTAF~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:62898}, goog:processID: 7916, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:62898/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.160, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (aaca3839202444643547357f5c74f6d6)] -> css selector: div.overlay-content a.btn.add-to-cart] Session ID: aaca3839202444643547357f5c74f6d6

Account already deleted: me@test.com — skipping. ==============================
========== TC15: Place Order - Register before Checkout ========== STEP 1: Browser launched. STEP 2: Opening home page... STEP 3: Verifying home page is visible... STEP 4: Clicking 'Signup / Login' button... STEP 5: Filling signup details and creating account... STEP 6: Verifying 'ACCOUNT CREATED!' and clicking Continue... STEP 7: Verifying 'Logged in as username'... STEP 8: Adding products to cart...

testcase.name: testPlaceOrderLoginBeforeCheckout
testcase.system-out:
Deleted: me@test.com ==============================
[BASE TEST] Screenshot captured: testPlaceOrderRegisterWhileCheckout [BASE TEST] Screenshot attached to Allure. ========== TC16: Place Order - Login before Checkout ========== PRE-STEP: Registering new account for login... STEP 1: Browser launched. STEP 2: Opening home page... STEP 3: Verifying home page is visible... STEP 4: Clicking 'Signup / Login' button... STEP 5: Entering login credentials... STEP 6: Verifying 'Logged in as username'... STEP 7: Adding products to cart... STEP 8: Clicking 'Cart' button... STEP 9: Verifying cart page is displayed... STEP 10: Clicking 'Proceed To Checkout'... STEP 11: Verifying Address Details and Review Your Order... STEP 12: Entering description and clicking Place Order... STEP 13: Entering payment details... STEP 14: Clicking 'Pay and Confirm Order'... STEP 15: Verifying order success message... STEP 16: Clicking 'Delete Account'... STEP 17: Verifying 'ACCOUNT DELETED!' and clicking Continue... ✅ TC16 PASSED: Order placed after login before checkout. ======================================================

STEP 12: Verifying products persist after login... ✅ TC20 PASSED: 3 products persist after login. ========================================================================

testcase.name: testRegisterWithWeakPassword

failure.message: BUG: No password strength validation! Weak password '123' was accepted. Account was created.

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: BUG: No password strength validation! Weak password '123' was accepted. STEP 2: Opening home page... STEP 3: Verifying home page... STEP 4: Clicking Signup/Login... STEP 5: Entering name and email... STEP 6: Clicking Signup... STEP 7: Filling account details... STEP 8: Entering weak password: '123'... STEP 9: Clicking Create Account... STEP 10: Checking if account was created with weak password...
